channel.title: easy-baking-posts Posts - RSS Feed
channel.description: Fresh easy-baking-posts posts and cooking inspiration

item.title: Easy Easter Dessert Ideas That Taste Like You Spent Hours Baking
item.description: These Easter desserts are a lifesaver when you're short on time but want something festive and yummy. I love how simple ingredients come together to make treats that feel special. Perfect for family dinners or surprise guests!
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 30 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 6

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 2 cups all-purpose flour, sifted
  • 1 cup granulated sugar
  • 1/2 cup unsalted butter, softened
  • 3 large eggs
  • 1 cup milk
  • 2 teaspoons baking powder
  • 1 teaspoon vanilla extract
  • 1/2 teaspoon salt
  • Assorted pastel-colored sprinkles or edible decorations

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761230294638 #Easypost #1hourmeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #allpurpose #granulated #unsalted

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends

media:content.media:title: Easy Easter Dessert Ideas That Taste Like You Spent Hours Baking
media:content.media:description: These Easter desserts are a lifesaver when you're short on time but want something festive and yummy. I love how simple ingredients come together to make treats that feel special. Perfect for family dinners or surprise guests!

media:group.media:keywords: cat1761230294638, Easypost, 1hourmeals, post, cooking, foodie, homemade, delicious, allpurpose, granulated, unsalted

item.title: Easy Springtime Lemon Blueberry Tart That Everyone Will Love
item.description: This lemon blueberry tart is a fresh and simple dessert bursting with bright citrus and juicy berries. The buttery crust and creamy filling make it perfect for spring gatherings or a sunny weekend treat.
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 20 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 35 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 8

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 1 1/4 cups all-purpose flour, sifted
  • 1/4 cup powdered sugar
  • 1/2 cup unsalted butter, cold and cubed
  • 1 large egg yolk
  • 1 tablespoon ice water
  • 1 cup fresh blueberries
  • 3/4 cup granulated sugar
  • 3 large eggs
  • 1/2 cup fresh lemon juice (about 2 lemons)
  • 1 tablespoon lemon zest
  • 1/2 cup heavy cream

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761230294638 #Easypost #1hourmeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #allpurpose #powdered #unsalted

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends

media:content.media:title: Easy Springtime Lemon Blueberry Tart That Everyone Will Love
media:content.media:description: This lemon blueberry tart is a fresh and simple dessert bursting with bright citrus and juicy berries. The buttery crust and creamy filling make it perfect for spring gatherings or a sunny weekend treat.

media:group.media:keywords: cat1761230294638, Easypost, 1hourmeals, post, cooking, foodie, homemade, delicious, allpurpose, powdered, unsalted

item.title: Classic Italian Easter Cookies with a Hint of Anise Flavor
item.description: These traditional Italian Easter cookies are simple yet full of flavor, featuring a subtle anise twist. Perfect for spring celebrations, they’re easy to make and share with loved ones.
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 20 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 24

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 3 cups all-purpose flour, sifted
  • 1 cup granulated sugar
  • 3 large eggs
  • 1/2 cup unsalted butter, softened
  • 1 tablespoon anise seeds, lightly crushed
  • 1 teaspoon baking powder
  • 1/4 teaspoon salt
  • 1 teaspoon vanilla extract
  • Powdered sugar for dusting

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761230294638 #Easypost #1hourmeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #allpurpose #granulated #large

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends

media:content.media:title: Classic Italian Easter Cookies with a Hint of Anise Flavor
media:content.media:description: These traditional Italian Easter cookies are simple yet full of flavor, featuring a subtle anise twist. Perfect for spring celebrations, they’re easy to make and share with loved ones.

media:group.media:keywords: cat1761230294638, Easypost, 1hourmeals, post, cooking, foodie, homemade, delicious, allpurpose, granulated, large

item.title: Classic Italian Easter Cookies with a Delightful Citrus and Anise Twist
item.description: These soft Italian Easter cookies are bursting with bright citrus and a hint of anise, making them a perfect sweet treat for spring celebrations. Topped with cheerful sprinkles, they’re great for sharing with family around the holiday table.
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 20 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 18 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 24

📊 Difficulty: Medium

🥘 Ingredients

  • 3 cups all-purpose flour, sifted
  • 1 cup granulated sugar
  • 2 large eggs
  • 1/2 cup unsalted butter, softened
  • 1/4 cup whole milk
  • 1 tablespoon baking powder
  • 1 teaspoon anise extract
  • Zest of 1 lemon
  • 1/2 teaspoon salt
  • Colorful sprinkles for topping

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761230294638 #Mediumpost #1hourmeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #allpurpose #granulated #large

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

media:content.media:title: Classic Italian Easter Cookies with a Delightful Citrus and Anise Twist
media:content.media:description: These soft Italian Easter cookies are bursting with bright citrus and a hint of anise, making them a perfect sweet treat for spring celebrations. Topped with cheerful sprinkles, they’re great for sharing with family around the holiday table.

item.title: Soft Italian Easter Cookies with a Hint of Anise for Springtime Joy
item.description: These Italian Easter cookies are soft, lightly sweet, and have a lovely anise flavor that makes them special. They bake up golden and pillowy, perfect for spring brunches or family gatherings. I always find they bring a little sunshine to the table!
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 20 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 24

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 3 cups all-purpose flour, sifted
  • 1 cup granulated sugar
  • 1/2 cup unsalted butter, softened
  • 3 large eggs
  • 2 teaspoons baking powder
  • 1 teaspoon anise extract
  • 1/2 teaspoon salt
  • Powdered sugar for dusting (optional)

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761230294638 #Easypost #1hourmeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #allpurpose #granulated #unsalted

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends

media:content.media:title: Soft Italian Easter Cookies with a Hint of Anise for Springtime Joy
media:content.media:description: These Italian Easter cookies are soft, lightly sweet, and have a lovely anise flavor that makes them special. They bake up golden and pillowy, perfect for spring brunches or family gatherings. I always find they bring a little sunshine to the table!

media:group.media:keywords: cat1761230294638, Easypost, 1hourmeals, post, cooking, foodie, homemade, delicious, allpurpose, granulated, unsalted

item.title: Easy No-Bake Easter Sweets Everyone Will Love
item.description: These no-bake Easter sweets are a total lifesaver when you need a quick, homemade treat. Made with simple ingredients and zero fuss, they’re perfect for last-minute holiday fun or an easy dessert to share with family.
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 0 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 8

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 2 cups mini marshmallows
  • 1 cup powdered sugar
  • 1/2 cup creamy peanut butter
  • 1 teaspoon vanilla extract
  • 1 1/2 cups crispy rice cereal
  • Colored sprinkles or mini chocolate eggs for decoration

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761230294638 #Easypost #quickpost #30minutemeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #marshmallows #powdered #creamy

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends

media:content.media:title: Easy No-Bake Easter Sweets Everyone Will Love
media:content.media:description: These no-bake Easter sweets are a total lifesaver when you need a quick, homemade treat. Made with simple ingredients and zero fuss, they’re perfect for last-minute holiday fun or an easy dessert to share with family.

media:group.media:keywords: cat1761230294638, Easypost, quickpost, 30minutemeals, post, cooking, foodie, homemade, delicious, marshmallows, powdered, creamy

item.title: Sweet-Tart Rhubarb and Strawberry Crisp with Oat Crumble Topping
item.description: This rhubarb and strawberry crisp balances tangy fruit with a buttery oat topping for a cozy, crunchy dessert. Quick to make and perfect for weekends or surprise guests!
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 30 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 6

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 4 cups fresh rhubarb, chopped into 1-inch pieces
  • 3 cups fresh strawberries, hulled and halved
  • 1 cup granulated sugar
  • 2 tablespoons cornstarch
  • 1 teaspoon vanilla extract
  • 1 cup rolled oats
  • 3/4 cup all-purpose flour
  • 1/2 cup packed brown sugar
  • 1/2 teaspoon ground cinnamon
  • 1/4 teaspoon salt
  • 1/2 cup unsalted butter, cold and cubed

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761230294638 #Easypost #1hourmeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #fresh #granulated

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends

media:content.media:title: Sweet-Tart Rhubarb and Strawberry Crisp with Oat Crumble Topping
media:content.media:description: This rhubarb and strawberry crisp balances tangy fruit with a buttery oat topping for a cozy, crunchy dessert. Quick to make and perfect for weekends or surprise guests!

media:group.media:keywords: cat1761230294638, Easypost, 1hourmeals, post, cooking, foodie, homemade, delicious, fresh, granulated

item.title: Classic Strawberry Rhubarb Crisp with Oat Topping
item.description: This strawberry rhubarb crisp blends tart rhubarb with sweet strawberries under a crunchy oat topping. The brown sugar caramelizes perfectly for a warm, cozy dessert. Ideal for spring weekends or casual family dinners!
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 40 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 6

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 4 cups fresh strawberries, hulled and halved
  • 3 cups rhubarb, chopped into 1/2 inch pieces
  • 1 cup granulated sugar
  • 1/2 cup brown sugar, packed
  • 1/4 cup all-purpose flour
  • 1 teaspoon vanilla extract
  • 1 cup rolled oats
  • 1/2 cup all-purpose flour (for topping)
  • 1/2 cup cold unsalted butter, diced
  • 1/2 teaspoon ground cinnamon
  • Pinch of salt

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761230294638 #Easypost #1hourmeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #fresh #rhubarb #granulated

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends

media:content.media:title: Classic Strawberry Rhubarb Crisp with Oat Topping
media:content.media:description: This strawberry rhubarb crisp blends tart rhubarb with sweet strawberries under a crunchy oat topping. The brown sugar caramelizes perfectly for a warm, cozy dessert. Ideal for spring weekends or casual family dinners!

media:group.media:keywords: cat1761230294638, Easypost, 1hourmeals, post, cooking, foodie, homemade, delicious, fresh, rhubarb, granulated

item.title: Zesty Lemon Poppy Seed Cake That’s Perfect for Springtime Gatherings
item.description: This lemon poppy seed cake is bright and moist with a lovely crunch from the poppy seeds. Using fresh lemon zest and buttermilk keeps it tender and fresh. Great for a spring afternoon tea or a light dessert.
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 30 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 8

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 1 1/2 cups all-purpose flour, sifted
  • 1 teaspoon baking powder
  • 1/2 teaspoon baking soda
  • 1/4 teaspoon salt
  • 1 tablespoon poppy seeds
  • 1/2 cup unsalted butter, softened
  • 1 cup granulated sugar
  • 2 large eggs, room temperature
  • 1 teaspoon vanilla extract
  • 1 tablespoon freshly grated lemon zest
  • 1/2 cup buttermilk, room temperature
  • 2 tablespoons fresh lemon juice

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761230294638 #Easypost #1hourmeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #allpurpose #teaspoon

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends

media:content.media:title: Zesty Lemon Poppy Seed Cake That’s Perfect for Springtime Gatherings
media:content.media:description: This lemon poppy seed cake is bright and moist with a lovely crunch from the poppy seeds. Using fresh lemon zest and buttermilk keeps it tender and fresh. Great for a spring afternoon tea or a light dessert.

media:group.media:keywords: cat1761230294638, Easypost, 1hourmeals, post, cooking, foodie, homemade, delicious, allpurpose, teaspoon

item.title: Easter Bunny Cupcakes: Soft Vanilla Cupcakes with Buttercream and Marshmallow Bunny Faces
item.description: These Easter Bunny Cupcakes combine tender vanilla cake with smooth, creamy buttercream frosting. The cute bunny faces made from marshmallows and candies bring a playful touch to spring gatherings. This recipe is approachable for home cooks and a fun activity to share with children during Easter or spring celebrations.
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 25 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 20 minutes

⏰ Total Time: 45 minutes

🍽️ Servings: 12

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends

media:content.media:title: Easter Bunny Cupcakes: Soft Vanilla Cupcakes with Buttercream and Marshmallow Bunny Faces
media:content.media:description: These Easter Bunny Cupcakes combine tender vanilla cake with smooth, creamy buttercream frosting. The cute bunny faces made from marshmallows and candies bring a playful touch to spring gatherings. This recipe is approachable for home cooks and a fun activity to share with children during Easter or spring celebrations.
